text: LayerNorm normalises out uniform shifts, so additive test perturbations like obs[:,slice]+=1.5 or weight.add_(0.5) become invisible post-normalisation.

locator.quote: phase-15 regression tests now use multiplicative perturbations

text: Fix: the phase-15 regression tests now use multiplicative perturbations (weight.mul_(2.0)) and full-replacement perturbations so the guards survive LayerNorm.
